response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and 19+ years of diverse technical experience across infrastructure, full-stack systems, and large-scale services, he lacks the core domain expertise required for this principal-level role. The resume shows no evidence of experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, metrics/telemetry infrastructure, or feature-flagging systems—all critical to the growth/experimentation engineering mission. His background is primarily full-stack development, data integration, and GIS systems rather than growth measurement platforms. Although he has the technical foundation to eventually learn these systems, a principal role typically requires deep, demonstrated expertise in experimentation and measurement platforms from day one.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals with 19+ years of breadth across web, mobile, infrastructure, and systems
Demonstrated ability to architect and optimize at scale (Dunnhumby: millions of requests/second, low-latency infrastructure)
Hands-on technical contributor with strength in systems, DevOps, and infrastructure (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, multiple languages)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature-flagging systems, or rollout infrastructure—the core of this role
Missing metrics/telemetry infrastructure and experimental analysis expertise; background is full-stack development rather than growth/measurement systems
No evidence of principal-level cross-team influence, multi-product strategy ownership, or high-availability multi-region distributed systems architecture

key_factors.factor: Strong software engineering fundamentals and systems knowledge
Principal-level scope and cross-team leadership evidence mismatch
